sec2Card7.title: Gallery to Garment: Art Meets Design
sec2Card7.description: When brushstrokes inspire hemlines and canvases shape silhouettes, the result is a striking fusion of visual art and fashion design.

sec2Card7.title: Sustainable Eating in a Climate-Conscious World
sec2Card7.description: As climate concerns grow, our plates are becoming powerful tools for change. Sustainable eating—centered on plant-based choices, local sourcing, and reducing food waste.
